tools.name: Cuboid Fit (RANSAC)
tools.subtitle: Robust cuboid fitting in 3D point clouds
tools.description: A RANSAC-based algorithm that fits the best-matching cuboid to a set of 3D points, automatically separating inliers (points on the cuboid surface) from outliers. The main function CuboidRANSAC returns the fitted model — center coordinates, dimensions, and orientation (roll, pitch, yaw) — and the result terminates once 90% of points are classified as inliers or after 1,000 iterations. Sample data and a runme.m script are included for immediate testing, and both the point cloud and fitted cuboid are visualized.
